rows: Hong Kong Street Rat who can see the dead

Your childhood was a world away from America. Hong Kong of the late 19th century was shifting rapidly from a backwater fishing village to a British Imperial trading center. Not that it aided your family any. Your mother, a prostitute, sold herself to the any number of sailors and traders who came through, and truth be told, you are a little fuzzy on your own heritge and origins. Your earliest memories were of running in the streets with the other urchins, trying your best to earn a bit of food or entertain yourself however you could. That was how you had the accident that would change your life forever. You and your friends had gotten in the way of a fast moving carriage. No one cared enough to slow down, and you were knocked out of the way, cracking your skull. Two of your friends were killed. In the hubub and aftermath, few noticed what happened, and you still don't know who saved your or why. You just know that when you awoke, you could see your two friends standing there, their ghosts watching you in tears. You could see the spirits of the dead. Hoping to do something witht his, you approached a man who claimed to be a ritual master (wu) who could manipulate the spirits of the dead. For years you worked by his side as his apprentice, though frankly, you wonder now if there was more charlatan than shaman with him. Whatever the case, he wasn't long for the world. The Tremere found him eventually, thinking he might be of use. When he proved not to be, they turned to you. Your gift with ghosts proved most useful to them, and they made you one of them.

The regiment of the Tremere is a far cry from your undisciplined youth, but there is comfort in that. Here, at least, you can expand your knowledge and learn all manner of things. You learned the Western ways, and grounded yourself in the art of Necromancy, something few of their number ever learned. More than that, you had the cultural understanding to further their knowledge of the kuei jin, the vampiric-like creatures at home in your homeland. Oliver Thrace ordered members of the chantry to research as much as they could, and given your natural curiosity and your ethnicity, you were able to access much of the esoteric lore than more of the Western Tremere could not. Besides, amongst the kuei jin you found no better resources regarding the nature of the wraithlands and the lands of the dead, and it was a mutually satisfying and productive relationship. However, others thought you were perhaps a bit too close to the odd kuei jin, and what was more, your knowledge of much more of use elsewhere now. By this time, the New Promise Mandernate was already beginning to push into the West Coast of the United States, and the clan needed experts who could disseminate knowledge and lore amongst the others. You were given orders to relocate to Las Vegas and the massive research chantry there. Unhappy with being removed from your home, you did as you were bid to do. After all, who knows what new and interesting things you could find in this new world.

Your time in Vegas proved exceedingly fruitful for the clan and your research was invaluable. However, when the city fell to the Second Inquisition, you and the chantry were forced to hide deep in the bunker that the chantry was a part of. You've been in hiding there against the Technocratic mages who have threatened, until it was safe enough to get out with some of the precious information of the chantry to the closest city with an active chantry - Los Angeles. You are here carrying with you research and a warning about what is coming for everyone.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Tremere - your former Regent, she is the head of research and has pushed the Cathayan and wraith research in Las Vegas.
Tremere - your Lord and the previous Regent of Los Angeles
You have brought with you all your research from Las Vegas. Make yourself useful to this Regent to finally gain enough status in the clan to show your true leadership material.

You have long worked in the realm of the spirits alongside the Giovanni. You know they are up to something that is both dangerous and foolish. You've not heard from anyone in Las Vegas in the family. Investigate what happened to them.

You know the truth about the connection between the Technocratic Mages and the Second Inquisition. You also know that they have information the Tremere thought was protected by the Nosferatu. Work with them to figure out what happened and reach out to others who might be interested in preparing the city for what you know is coming.

rows: You have been doing research on the Node. You know a lot of the history of it and the conflicts surrounding it, not to mention why Mages want to protect it. Before game, ask Jenn 3 questions regarding node.

You've also been involved in the Cathayan research. You know that they are able to walk in the Shadowlands and that they are targeting Camarilla strongholds because of it. If they were to get wind of the node in Las Vegas, they could be interested in launching attacks on the city, information the Camarilla and Giovanni perhaps should know about.

You are aware that part of the Ward vs. Cathayans ritual the Tremere have created is fueling a crack between this realm and hell. The Regent has yet to release this information public, but you know that you stumbled on this because of your Node research. Such a crack could allow others to use powers to widen or even open completely a gateway between two realms. Considering what is on the other side of Yomi, this could be a bad thing for all of you.
